Log:
  www/nextcloud: Update to 13.0.1

   - Includes breaking rename of $WWWDIR/apps path
   - Add fix file and warnings
   - Add OpCache option
   - Alphabetic ordering
   - Migration from ownCloud is stale
   - Take maintainership

  Approved by:    Loic Blot <loic blot unix-experience fr> (maintainer)
